description: COMP-2 IEEE 754 double-precision: 15-digit + 2-decimal value preserved through float round-trip
notes: COMP-2 double-precision (~15 significant digits) stores 123456789012345.67 without precision loss at this scale. Engine uses PIC clause with COMP-2 (non-standard but functional). IBM COMP-2 has no PIC — uses raw 8-byte IEEE double.
